_meta.description: GitLab MCP — access merge requests, issues, commits, and pipelines

prompts.GITLAB_TOKEN: GitLab Personal Access Token (Settings → Access Tokens → read_api scope)
prompts.GITLAB_URL: Your GitLab URL (e.g. https://gitlab.com or https://gitlab.company.com)
